originalTitle: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
title: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
content: Cameroon's President Paul Biya, 93, won his eighth successive term last year in a disputed election.

title: Senegal bans ministers from foreign travel as oil price rise bites
content: The fuel cost is nearly double what the government budgeted for putting pressure on stretched finances.

content: People evicted to build Nigeria's capital accuse the government of failing to fulfill its promises to them.

title: Israel continues deadly attacks on Gaza while striking Iran, Lebanon
content: Israel has kept up its attacks on Gaza while striking Iran and Lebanon, killing at least four Palestinians on Sunday.

content: Since January, Iran's near total internet blackout has impacted jobs and businesses.

title: How downed F-15 US airman was rescued inside Iran
content: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

title: Hungary alleges plot to blow up gas pipeline ahead of election
content: The incident comes a week before the polls, and follow warnings of a potential operations staged to influence voters.

title: Leeds draw Chelsea, Man City face Southampton in FA Cup semis
content: Leeds United will play Chelsea at Wembley after reaching the FA Cup semi-finals for the first time in almost four decades, while Manchester City take on Southampton.

title: Liverpool 'gave up' in FA Cup exit - Van Dijk

originalTitle: Survival or FA Cup glory - which would you choose?
title: Survival or FA Cup glory - which would you choose?
content: Leeds visit West Ham on Sunday in the FA Cup quarter-finals but both are also in a relegation scrap. Would you risk safety for glory?
